name: agent-coord-bootstrap
description: Scaffold or upgrade an agent-coordination doc layer (AGENTS.md + .agent_works/ + cross-runtime aliases). Fresh projects get a clean init; existing projects get a content-preserving migration. Seeds lightweight code-health practices (verification, documented features, deletion care) that keep the codebase maintainable.

defaultPrompt: Run /agent-coord-bootstrap:init-agent-coord (Claude Code) or $agent-coord-bootstrap (Codex) in the project root you want to initialize or upgrade.
